compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Controls 2 independent HID light banks via relay switching; staggered switch-on to reduce inrush; bank alternation for even canopy coverage; lamp over-temp detection optional; relay boxes normally supplied with IntelliClimate kit

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: On/off relay switching only; no 0-10V or PWM dimming control; LED lights operable via relay for schedule-based on/off; 2 banks supported; dimming requires separate external controller

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Controls primary cooling fan and optionally a second cooling fan or air conditioning unit; on/off relay switching; any mains-powered fan or AC unit compatible via relay box

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Explicitly supports fan-based fogger, ultrasonic humidifier, or nozzle-type fogger; activates when humidity drops below set point

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Any mains dehumidifier compatible via relay box; activates when humidity exceeds set point; adjustable switching offsets to prevent rapid cycling

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Controls CO2 solenoid valve on/off for regulator-based CO2 injection; built-in CO2 sensor (0-5000 ppm optional); light sensor prevents CO2 injection during dark periods; CO2 generator control also supported via relay

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Bluelab Power Relay R4 or any 24V DC coil relay/contactor
compatible_devices.notes: Any mains heater compatible via relay box; activates when temperature drops below set point; total mains current through each relay box must not exceed relay label rating

EnviroSensor monitors temperature, relative humidity, CO2 (0-5000 ppm, optional), and light level; also supports optional lamp over-temperature sensor and outside temperature probe; IntelliClimate kit includes EnviroSensor
